name: Polygon Master
author: Poki
description: Polygon Master is a puzzle game where you can craft stunning images using colorful polygons! Drag and drop each polygon piece to its correct spot to complete the artwork. Begin with simple shapes like hexagons and gradually tackle more intricate designs like fruits, animals, and more. Relax, have fun, and challenge your skills as the puzzles become more complex. Are you ready to prove you're the true Polygon Master? How to play Polygon Master? Click and hold to select and move a polygon piece, and release to place it. Who created Polygon Master? Polygon Master is created by Kzunec Games. Play their other games on Poki: Draw Pixel Art and Pixel Fishing ! How can I play Polygon Master for free? You can play Polygon Master for free on Poki. Can I play Polygon Master on mobile devices and desktop? Polygon Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
